name: SonarQube Server
description: Monitor SonarQube Server (on-prem/self-hosted) for code vulnerabilities, security hotspots, and code quality across all projects.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to your SonarQube Server instance
2. Go to My Account > Security
3. Generate a new User token
4. Enter your server URL and token below

credentialFields.label: SonarQube Server URL
credentialFields.helpText: Your SonarQube Server base URL (e.g. https://sonar.yourcompany.com)

credentialFields.label: User Token
credentialFields.helpText: Generate in SonarQube > My Account > Security > Generate Tokens

checks.name: Secure Code
checks.description: Checks for critical and blocker vulnerabilities across all projects in SonarQube Server

checks.name: Sanitized Inputs
checks.description: Checks for unreviewed security hotspots across all projects in SonarQube Server

checks.name: Code Changes
checks.description: Verifies that SonarQube Server projects have recent analysis activity, indicating code is being scanned regularly.
